---
title: "Lewis Carroll\'s Diaries: The private journals of Charles Lutwidge Dodgson (Lewis Carroll) ed. Edward Wakeling"
---

## Lewis Carroll\'s Diaries: The private journals of Charles Lutwidge Dodgson (Lewis Carroll) ed. Edward Wakeling

**Author:** The Rev. Charles Lutwidge Dodgson
**Date:** 1993-2007
**Imprint:** Luton: Lewis Carroll Society

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
